violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The upper middle lid of the front prep cooler was being held up with black tape.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom door of the F’real machine going into the mixing chamber needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The wire shelves under the stainless steel counter in the back kitchen need to be cleaned. The fan in the front kitchen needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in the hood system for the front kitchen need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in freezer needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and cracked floor tile by the ice machine and sink area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)

Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
